Keep orchestration here; split editor UI into workspace modules. Raised 2026-06-04 from 4987 for conditional condition-variable insert handler (handleConditionalVarInsert, UX #3), then to 5044 for the deferred asset-select populate wiring (focus/mousedown handlers + populate-before-filter; the asset picker now defers its full option list and builds it on focus instead of inlining every candidate across hundreds of slots), then lowered to 5037 after removing dead sourceSliceReplacementText, then to 5030 after adopting shared dom_text_utils helpers (removed local escape/ensureArray duplicates). Paid by the editing.css slack lowering so the aggregate stays flat. Raised 2026-06-10 to 5194 (+5) for 98.5 R3: openDraftEditAction now falls back to openSourceSliceAction when focusDraftField misses and the action carries a source anchor (render-diet fields have no DOM node to focus; previously a dead 'could not find that editor field' status). Raised 2026-06-13 to 5210 (+16) for 98.51 Bug 4: the open_project_metadata action handler + openProjectMetadataEditor helper route a System UI header click straight to the Game Info (project metadata) editor, instead of the inline identity_title task that could only resolve a scene-title fallback (never the real game title/author).

Keep field rendering here; split domain sub-renderers into sibling modules. Raised 2026-06-04 from 4796 for condition-variable insert chips (UX #3), then to 4886 for the conditional-leaf ladder de-duplication (suppress redundant flat leaf rows, render one compact condition->text ladder + read-only preview ladder), then to 4892 for skipping the mashed all-branches inline preview on conditional-tree fields (ladder owns the per-branch rendered view), then to 4897 for suppressing redundant diagnostic chrome on conditional-tree fields, then to 4899 for extending that chrome suppression to flat conditional-leaf rows (status badge / logic chips / context hint / variable picker) while keeping their label + editable input, then to 4905 for capping the variable-picker initial render to a 12-candidate starter slice instead of dumping the whole catalog per field (the unsliced render multiplied into ~1.3M DOM nodes / ~190MB innerHTML / ~25s paint on dense events; the search box rebuilds from the model so nothing is lost), then lowered to 4848 after removing dead functions and moving escapeHtml/escapeAttr/ensureArray to shared dom_text_utils.js. Paid by the editing.css slack lowering so the aggregate stays flat. Lowered 2026-06-09 to 4896 (actual 4896, 0 slack) for gap #2: renderConditionalVarInserts (the conditional var-insert chip renderer) moved verbatim to the off-budget object_editor_inserts.js sibling, which also hosts the new prose [+ qdisplay +] inserter. What stays in-file is the objectEditorInserts() resolver (browser global, else require() so Node check harnesses loading only this module still resolve the moved renderer), the renderModal setEventContext(body) call, and the renderInlineField renderQdisplayInsert injection. The ~11-line extraction is consumed by that resolver + the two call lines, so this ceiling falls 3 (4899->4896) and exactly funds the +3 elsewhere (index.html + en + zh script-tag/key raises): the aggregate stays flat. The inserter's CSS lives off-budget in preview-object-editor.css and its markup/logic/listeners in object_editor_inserts.js. Raised 2026-06-10 to 4907 (+11) for the gap #4 flat-condition builder injection: the objectEditorConditionBuilder require()-fallback resolver plus the semantic condition card computing conditionBuilderHtml and falling back to the read-only structure preview when the byte-exact gate rejects; the builder itself (parser, recompose, rows, listeners) lives off-budget in the new object_editor_condition_builder.js sibling. Raised 2026-06-10 to 4919 (+12) for 98.5 R3: the objectEditorDeferredSlice resolver plus the two deferred-summary renderers delegating their list body to that sibling (every diet-deferred row rendered with a Source Slice entry instead of a 10-row read-only cap; the legacy capped digest remains as the no-sibling fallback). Entry builders, action encoding, and the self-registered click listener live off-budget in object_editor_deferred_slice.js. Raised 2026-06-11 to 4926 (+7) for 98.5 R4: the objectEditorOvercapSlice resolver plus renderOpaqueBlocks appending an over-cap Source Slice entry on read-only blocks; the entry markup, dendryDesktop.readSourceSlice load, freshness gate, and click listener live off-budget in object_editor_overcap_slice.js.
